title: Aeronautics Wind Sound
description: A mod that allows you to hear the sound of wind while riding an Aeronautics vehicle, with the volume dynamically adjusted based on the vehicle's speed and whether you are sheltered.
body:
Do you feel that cruising on a Create: Aeronautics airship is a bit too quiet and lacking in immersion?

This mod allows players to hear the rushing sound of wind when riding a moving physics structure, with the volume dynamically adjusting according to the vehicle's speed.

Furthermore, when the player is sheltered—specifically, when there are blocks obstructing the view within a certain distance in the direction of the vehicle's movement—the wind sound will be attenuated.

The upper and lower speed thresholds, volume range, and sheltered volume coefficient can all be customized in the configuration file.
